name: Fleet Ops Console
description: Internal admin shell for an SRE fleet-ops tool. Compares a data-dense table-first console against a card-driven incident-first console, across light/dark themes and sidebar/top-nav layouts.

variants.name: Data-dense
variants.description: Wide tabular layout. Optimized for engineers who already know what they're looking for.

variants.name: Card-driven
variants.description: Incident-first cards with status accents. Optimized for triage during an active page.

themes.name: Light
themes.description: Daytime palette. Higher information density relies on stronger row dividers.

themes.name: Dark
themes.description: On-call palette. Status colors carry the saturation, chrome stays muted.

layouts.name: Sidebar
layouts.description: Persistent left rail with primary nav and tenant switcher.

layouts.name: Top nav
layouts.description: Horizontal nav with breadcrumb-driven page switching.
